response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture, distributed systems, or technical leadership in cloud environments.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead complex projects and build dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams
